text: 4087 - رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "صَاحِبُ اَلْوَدِيعَةِ وَ اَلْبِضَاعَةِ مُؤْتَمَنَانِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4087 - Hammad narrated from al-Halabi, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"The trustee of a deposit (wadi'ah) and the trustee of merchandise (bida'ah) are both considered trustworthy."
